title: ajuga suffrutescens
intro: Ajuga suffrutescens is a type of flowering plant in the mint family, known for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Ajuga suffrutescens include the potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional medicine in Asia and other parts of the world.
